title: Custom Sticks → Insane Ability Sticks Mod
description: Adds unique custom sticks with special & unique properties
body:
# Custom Sticks Mod


Custom Sticks is a lightweight Minecraft mod that introduces new stick variants into the game.


- FOOD STICK


![food stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59374e57cb1b8b070f74f164331b7df73c3d0462.png)

- STRENGTH STICK


![strength](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4321fb2e2840f6566bc32bb94f333d25562ecd9a.png)


- MINER STICK


![miner stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/127ec5c14ca01416020bc3efc9226bccd8bfdd6a.png)


- FREEZE STICK


![Freeze Stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c002b4ff19ccd68d44e1c5e28156faa9cc2b3bdf.png)


- TNT STICK


![Tnt Stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b03ce452452b6ab46d0ff03550b64a89a9482895.png)


- CURSED STICK 


![cursed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c570ef7dbf5f5d7f36b0999111f2c535a6e7bc7.png)


- OP STICK


![op](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31a40db1b90956859951bc408156a7ae6c5fff65.png)


- DEADLY STICK


![deadly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c25155c8e0745413cfe0bec930c6c139582e53ec.png)



## ✨ Features

Multiple custom stick items

Clean vanilla-style textures

Lightweight & survival-friendly

Made entirely by me using MCreator

## 📦 Compatibility

Minecraft version: 1.21.8 

Mod loader: Neoforge & Fabric

## ⚠️ License

All Rights Reserved
You may not modify, redistribute, or reupload this mod without permission.

This is my first custom mod - I hope you will like it. Thanks For Downloading!
